Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (assistance for repayment of student loans)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (assistance for repayment of student loans)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to provide that payments made by an employer to an employee to assist them in repaying their student loans are not to be included in the employeeГўВҖВҷs income as income from an office or employment.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Subsection.Text: Paragraph 6(1)(a) of the Income Tax Act is amended by striking out ГўВҖВңorГўВҖВқ at the end of subparagraph (v), by adding ГўВҖВңorГўВҖВқ at the end of subparagraph (vi) and by adding the following after subparagraph (vi):

Subparagraph.Label: (vii)
Subparagraph.Text: that is received or enjoyed by the taxpayer under a program provided by the taxpayerГўВҖВҷs employer that is designed to assist employees with the repayment of student loans made to them under the Canada Student Loans Act, the Canada Student Financial Assistance Act, the Apprentice Loans Act or a law of a province governing the granting of financial assistance to students at the post-secondary school level;

Subsection.Text: Subsection (1) applies to the 2021 and subsequent taxation years.
